creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The update of windowmaker-0.96 is incomplete. The sources seem to be published via github now, but the Makefile does reference a source path which is not commonly accessible anymore:

[...]
=> Attempting to fetch http://windowmaker.org/pub/source/release/WindowMaker-0.96.0.tar.gz
fetch: http://windowmaker.org/pub/source/release/WindowMaker-0.96.0.tar.gz: Not Found

The tarball can be easily downloaded manually via 

https://github.com/window-maker/wmaker/releases/download/wmaker-0.96.0/WindowMaker-0.96.0.tar.gz
